name: tdf-app
description: TDF Records - CRM, Scheduling, Packages & Invoicing Platform

scripts.dev:mobile: if node scripts/mobile-workspace-ready.mjs --quiet; then npm --prefix tdf-mobile run start; elif [ "${REQUIRE_MOBILE_WORKSPACE:-0}" = "1" ]; then echo 'Missing or incomplete tdf-mobile install. Run: git submodule update --init --recursive && (cd tdf-mobile && npm install)' >&2; exit 1; else echo 'Skipping mobile dev: workspace missing or install incomplete'; fi
scripts.build:ui: sh -c 'if [ -n "${CI:-}" ] || [ -n "${CF_PAGES:-}" ]; then ./scripts/build-ui-with-install.sh; else npm run build --workspace=tdf-hq-ui && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -R tdf-hq-ui/dist/. dist/; fi'
scripts.test: npm run test:ui && npm run test:mobile
scripts.ci:ui: npm run build:ui && npm run test:ui
scripts.test:mobile: sh -c 'if node scripts/mobile-workspace-ready.mjs --quiet; then npm --prefix tdf-mobile run test -- "$@"; elif [ "${REQUIRE_MOBILE_WORKSPACE:-0}" = "1" ]; then echo "Missing or incomplete tdf-mobile install. Run: git submodule update --init --recursive && (cd tdf-mobile && npm install)" >&2; exit 1; else echo "Skipping mobile tests: workspace missing or install incomplete"; fi' --
scripts.lint: npm run lint:ui && npm run lint:mobile
scripts.lint:mobile: if node scripts/mobile-workspace-ready.mjs --quiet; then npm --prefix tdf-mobile run lint; elif [ "${REQUIRE_MOBILE_WORKSPACE:-0}" = "1" ]; then echo 'Missing or incomplete tdf-mobile install. Run: git submodule update --init --recursive && (cd tdf-mobile && npm install)' >&2; exit 1; else echo 'Skipping mobile lint: workspace missing or install incomplete'; fi
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:ui && npm run typecheck:mobile
scripts.typecheck:mobile: if node scripts/mobile-workspace-ready.mjs --quiet; then npm --prefix tdf-mobile run typecheck; elif [ "${REQUIRE_MOBILE_WORKSPACE:-0}" = "1" ]; then echo 'Missing or incomplete tdf-mobile install. Run: git submodule update --init --recursive && (cd tdf-mobile && npm install)' >&2; exit 1; else echo 'Skipping mobile typecheck: workspace missing or install incomplete'; fi
scripts.generate:api: npm run generate:api:ui && npm run generate:api:mobile
scripts.generate:api:mobile: if node scripts/mobile-workspace-ready.mjs --quiet; then npm --prefix tdf-mobile run --if-present generate:api; elif [ "${REQUIRE_MOBILE_WORKSPACE:-0}" = "1" ]; then echo 'Missing or incomplete tdf-mobile install. Run: git submodule update --init --recursive && (cd tdf-mobile && npm install)' >&2; exit 1; else echo 'Skipping mobile API generation: workspace missing or install incomplete'; fi

author: TDF Records
